revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|33791}} {{Lua|Module:String}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== This template is intended to be used on '''year in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2008 in Canada]] or [[:Category:1538 in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent years before or after it in the same decade (see example below). == Usage == {{Year in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. ==== Optional parameters ==== * {{para|nocountrycentury|{{var|yes}}}} — instead of categorising the page in "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName", use "Category:Years in CountryName".
This is used for countries such as [[:Category:Years in Yugoslavia|Yugoslavia]] and the [[:Category:Years in the Soviet Union|Soviet Union]], which existed only within one century. :Note: As an alternative mechanism with the same result, if the page "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName" is redirected to "Category:Years in CountryName", this template will resolve the redirect and use the latter instead (e.g. [[:Category:Years in Czechoslovakia]]). * {{para|newname|{{var|new name}}}} — use new name for parent categories where appropriate * {{para|newnamestart|{{var|new name start year}}}} — changeover year for new name === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1867 in Japan]]: {{year in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|year=1867}}
=== Example using all unnamed parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1954 in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|year=1954}}
===Example using newname parameters=== When placed on the page [[:Category:1771 in Thailand]]: {{Year in country category|Thailand|Southeast Asia|newname=Siam|newnamestart=1782}} generates the following parent categories: :[[:Category:1770s in Thailand]] – because the decade ends before the start date 1782 :[[:Category:Years of the 18th century in Siam]] – because the century ends after 1782 == Subtemplate == * [[Template:Year in country category/outer core]] ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter}} == See also == * [[Template:Decade in country category]] * [[Template:Year in continent category]] * [[Template:Category series navigation]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|33791}} {{Lua|Module:String}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== This template is intended to be used on '''year in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2008 in Canada]] or [[:Category:1538 in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent years before or after it in the same decade (see example below). == Usage == {{Year in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. ==== Optional parameters ==== * {{para|nocountrycentury|{{var|yes}}}} — instead of categorising the page in "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName", use "Category:Years in CountryName".
This is used for countries such as [[:Category:Years in Yugoslavia|Yugoslavia]] and the [[:Category:Years in the Soviet Union|Soviet Union]], which existed only within one century. :Note: As an alternative mechanism with the same result, if the page "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName" is redirected to "Category:Years in CountryName", this template will resolve the redirect and use the latter instead (e.g. [[:Category:Years in Czechoslovakia]]). * {{para|newname|{{var|new name}}}} — use new name for parent categories where appropriate * {{para|newnamestart|{{var|new name start year}}}} — changeover year for new name === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1867 in Japan]]: {{year in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|year=1867}}
=== Example using all unnamed parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1954 in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|year=1954}}
===Example using newname parameters=== When placed on the page [[:Category:1771 in Thailand]]: {{Year in country category|Thailand|Southeast Asia|newname=Siam|newnamestart=1782}} generates the following parent categories: :[[:Category:1770s in Thailand]] – because the decade ends before the start date 1782 :[[:Category:Years of the 18th century in Siam]] – because the century ends after 1782 == Subtemplate == * [[Template:Year in country category/outer core]] ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter}} == See also == * [[Template:Decade in country category]] * [[Template:Year in continent category]] * [[Template:Category series navigation]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|33791}} {{Lua|Module:String}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== This template is intended to be used on '''year in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2008 in Canada]] or [[:Category:1538 in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent years before or after it in the same decade (see example below). == Usage == {{Year in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. ==== Optional parameters ==== * {{para|nocountrycentury|{{var|yes}}}} — instead of categorising the page in "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName", use "Category:Years in CountryName".
This is used for countries such as [[:Category:Years in Yugoslavia|Yugoslavia]] and the [[:Category:Years in the Soviet Union|Soviet Union]], which existed only within one century. :Note: As an alternative mechanism with the same result, if the page "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName" is redirected to "Category:Years in CountryName", this template will resolve the redirect and use the latter instead (e.g. [[:Category:Years in Czechoslovakia]]). * {{para|newname|{{var|new name}}}} — use new name for parent categories where appropriate * {{para|newnamestart|{{var|new name start year}}}} — changeover year for new name === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1867 in Japan]]: {{year in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|year=1867}}
=== Example using all unnamed parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1954 in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|year=1954}}
===Example using newname parameters=== When placed on the page [[:Category:1771 in Thailand]]: {{Year in country category|Thailand|Southeast Asia|newname=Siam|newnamestart=1782}} generates the following parent categories: :[[:Category:1770s in Thailand]] – because the decade ends before the start date 1782 :[[:Category:Years of the 18th century in Siam]] – because the century ends after 1782 == Subtemplate == * [[Template:Year in country category/outer core]] ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter}} == See also == * [[Template:Decade in country category]] * [[Template:Year in continent category]] * [[Template:Category series navigation]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|33791}} {{Lua|Module:String}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== This template is intended to be used on '''year in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2008 in Canada]] or [[:Category:1538 in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent years before or after it in the same decade (see example below). == Usage == {{Year in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. ==== Optional parameters ==== * {{para|nocountrycentury|{{var|yes}}}} — instead of categorising the page in "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName", use "Category:Years in CountryName".
This is used for countries such as [[:Category:Years in Yugoslavia|Yugoslavia]] and the [[:Category:Years in the Soviet Union|Soviet Union]], which existed only within one century. :Note: As an alternative mechanism with the same result, if the page "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName" is redirected to "Category:Years in CountryName", this template will resolve the redirect and use the latter instead (e.g. [[:Category:Years in Czechoslovakia]]). * {{para|newname|{{var|new name}}}} — use new name for parent categories where appropriate * {{para|newnamestart|{{var|new name start year}}}} — changeover year for new name === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1867 in Japan]]: {{year in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|year=1867}}
=== Example using all unnamed parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1954 in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|year=1954}}
===Example using newname parameters=== When placed on the page [[:Category:1771 in Thailand]]: {{Year in country category|Thailand|Southeast Asia|newname=Siam|newnamestart=1782}} generates the following parent categories: :[[:Category:1770s in Thailand]] – because the decade ends before the start date 1782 :[[:Category:Years of the 18th century in Siam]] – because the century ends after 1782 == Subtemplate == * [[Template:Year in country category/outer core]] ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter}} == See also == * [[Template:Decade in country category]] * [[Template:Year in continent category]] * [[Template:Category series navigation]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|33791}} {{Lua|Module:String}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== This template is intended to be used on '''year in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2008 in Canada]] or [[:Category:1538 in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent years before or after it in the same decade (see example below). == Usage == {{Year in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. ==== Optional parameters ==== * {{para|nocountrycentury|{{var|yes}}}} — instead of categorising the page in "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName", use "Category:Years in CountryName".
This is used for countries such as [[:Category:Years in Yugoslavia|Yugoslavia]] and the [[:Category:Years in the Soviet Union|Soviet Union]], which existed only within one century. :Note: As an alternative mechanism with the same result, if the page "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName" is redirected to "Category:Years in CountryName", this template will resolve the redirect and use the latter instead (e.g. [[:Category:Years in Czechoslovakia]]). * {{para|newname|{{var|new name}}}} — use new name for parent categories where appropriate * {{para|newnamestart|{{var|new name start year}}}} — changeover year for new name === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1867 in Japan]]: {{year in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|year=1867}}
=== Example using all unnamed parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1954 in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|year=1954}}
===Example using newname parameters=== When placed on the page [[:Category:1771 in Thailand]]: {{Year in country category|Thailand|Southeast Asia|newname=Siam|newnamestart=1782}} generates the following parent categories: :[[:Category:1770s in Thailand]] – because the decade ends before the start date 1782 :[[:Category:Years of the 18th century in Siam]] – because the century ends after 1782 == Subtemplate == * [[Template:Year in country category/outer core]] ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter}} == See also == * [[Template:Decade in country category]] * [[Template:Year in continent category]] * [[Template:Category series navigation]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|33791}} {{Lua|Module:String}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== This template is intended to be used on '''year in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2008 in Canada]] or [[:Category:1538 in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent years before or after it in the same decade (see example below). == Usage == {{Year in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. ==== Optional parameters ==== * {{para|nocountrycentury|{{var|yes}}}} — instead of categorising the page in "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName", use "Category:Years in CountryName".
This is used for countries such as [[:Category:Years in Yugoslavia|Yugoslavia]] and the [[:Category:Years in the Soviet Union|Soviet Union]], which existed only within one century. :Note: As an alternative mechanism with the same result, if the page "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName" is redirected to "Category:Years in CountryName", this template will resolve the redirect and use the latter instead (e.g. [[:Category:Years in Czechoslovakia]]). * {{para|newname|{{var|new name}}}} — use new name for parent categories where appropriate * {{para|newnamestart|{{var|new name start year}}}} — changeover year for new name === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1867 in Japan]]: {{year in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|year=1867}}
=== Example using all unnamed parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1954 in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|year=1954}}
===Example using newname parameters=== When placed on the page [[:Category:1771 in Thailand]]: {{Year in country category|Thailand|Southeast Asia|newname=Siam|newnamestart=1782}} generates the following parent categories: :[[:Category:1770s in Thailand]] – because the decade ends before the start date 1782 :[[:Category:Years of the 18th century in Siam]] – because the century ends after 1782 == Subtemplate == * [[Template:Year in country category/outer core]] ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter}} == See also == * [[Template:Decade in country category]] * [[Template:Year in continent category]] * [[Template:Category series navigation]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|33791}} {{Lua|Module:String}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== This template is intended to be used on '''year in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2008 in Canada]] or [[:Category:1538 in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent years before or after it in the same decade (see example below). == Usage == {{Year in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. ==== Optional parameters ==== * {{para|nocountrycentury|{{var|yes}}}} — instead of categorising the page in "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName", use "Category:Years in CountryName".
This is used for countries such as [[:Category:Years in Yugoslavia|Yugoslavia]] and the [[:Category:Years in the Soviet Union|Soviet Union]], which existed only within one century. :Note: As an alternative mechanism with the same result, if the page "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName" is redirected to "Category:Years in CountryName", this template will resolve the redirect and use the latter instead (e.g. [[:Category:Years in Czechoslovakia]]). * {{para|newname|{{var|new name}}}} — use new name for parent categories where appropriate * {{para|newnamestart|{{var|new name start year}}}} — changeover year for new name === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1867 in Japan]]: {{year in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|year=1867}}
=== Example using all unnamed parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1954 in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|year=1954}}
===Example using newname parameters=== When placed on the page [[:Category:1771 in Thailand]]: {{Year in country category|Thailand|Southeast Asia|newname=Siam|newnamestart=1782}} generates the following parent categories: :[[:Category:1770s in Thailand]] – because the decade ends before the start date 1782 :[[:Category:Years of the 18th century in Siam]] – because the century ends after 1782 == Subtemplate == * [[Template:Year in country category/outer core]] ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter}} == See also == * [[Template:Decade in country category]] * [[Template:Year in continent category]] * [[Template:Category series navigation]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use|33791}} {{Lua|Module:String}} __NOTOC__ ==Purpose== This template is intended to be used on '''year in country''' categories (for example, [[:Category:2008 in Canada]] or [[:Category:1538 in England]]). It creates a "timeline" style table of links to categories for adjacent years before or after it in the same decade (see example below). == Usage == {{Year in country category| | | |}} === Parameters === The first three parameters indicate the country and its continent(s). *The first parameter is the country name as indicated in the category name (but without prefixes which are unwanted for sorting, these should be added to the 4th parameter). *The second parameter is the continent where the country is located. *The third parameter is ''optional'': if a country is located in two continents (mainly for countries in Europe and Asia, like Russia or Turkey), then a second continent can be included here. The order of the two continents is not important. This third parameter can also be used with member states of the United Kingdom (use "United Kingdom"), the former Soviet Union ("Soviet Union"), or former Yugoslavia ("Yugoslavia"). *The 4th parameter is used for sorting of countries which start with "The" (or other prefixes like "the Socialist Republic of "): this can be left empty for most countries. ==== Optional parameters ==== * {{para|nocountrycentury|{{var|yes}}}} — instead of categorising the page in "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName", use "Category:Years in CountryName".
This is used for countries such as [[:Category:Years in Yugoslavia|Yugoslavia]] and the [[:Category:Years in the Soviet Union|Soviet Union]], which existed only within one century. :Note: As an alternative mechanism with the same result, if the page "Category:Years of the nth century in CountryName" is redirected to "Category:Years in CountryName", this template will resolve the redirect and use the latter instead (e.g. [[:Category:Years in Czechoslovakia]]). * {{para|newname|{{var|new name}}}} — use new name for parent categories where appropriate * {{para|newnamestart|{{var|new name start year}}}} — changeover year for new name === Simple example === In most cases, only two parameters will be needed: the country and the continent. When placed on the page [[:Category:1867 in Japan]]: {{year in country category|Japan|Asia}} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Japan|Asia|nocat=yes|year=1867}}
=== Example using all unnamed parameters === When placed on the page [[:Category:1954 in the Socialist Republic of Macedonia]]: {{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of }} * displays the following:
{{year in country category|Macedonia|Europe|Yugoslavia|the Socialist Republic of |nocat=yes|year=1954}}
===Example using newname parameters=== When placed on the page [[:Category:1771 in Thailand]]: {{Year in country category|Thailand|Southeast Asia|newname=Siam|newnamestart=1782}} generates the following parent categories: :[[:Category:1770s in Thailand]] – because the decade ends before the start date 1782 :[[:Category:Years of the 18th century in Siam]] – because the century ends after 1782 == Subtemplate == * [[Template:Year in country category/outer core]] ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with prefix parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter}} *{{clc|Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter}} == See also == * [[Template:Decade in country category]] * [[Template:Year in continent category]] * [[Template:Category series navigation]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
